title: Update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v6 to v7 - autoclosed
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v6](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu) | require | major | `v6.3.0` -> `v7.0.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/go-criu (github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v6)</summary>

### [`v7.0.0`](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v7.0.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v6.3.0...v7.0.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Fix golangci-lint errors with latest version of it by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/100](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/100)
-   readme: Update latest release to 6.3.0 by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/99](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/99)
-   ci: add codeql as suggested by the bot (and fixes) by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/103](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/103)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.5.0 to 1.6.1 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/101](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/101)
-   Remove execute bit from source file by [@​gibmat](https://togithub.com/gibmat) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/104](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/104)
-   Update golang.org/x/sys to 0.5.0 by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/107](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/107)
-   ci: disable musttag in golangci-lint by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/108](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/108)
-   ci: add markdown linter by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/111](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/111)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.28.1 to 1.30.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/112](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/112)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.5.0 to 0.6.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/113](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/113)
-   ci: update go version by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/110](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/110)
-   Adapt code coverage to Go 1.20 by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/117](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/117)
-   Enable coverage for crit-test by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/119](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/119)
-   Fix crash when feature check environment variables are not set by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/118](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/118)
-   Turn on more linters and fix corresponding errors by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/120](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/120)
-   ci: fix protoc-gen-go path for go install by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/114](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/114)
-   Update to latest protobuf definition from criu/master by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/124](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/124)
-   test: enable coverage of crit unit/e2e tests by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/121](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/121)
-   ci: cancel preceding workflows run by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/122](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/122)
-   Generate test coverage for scripts/ by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/126](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/126)
-   Add top-level clean make target by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/125](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/125)
-   Also run staticcheck during CI by [@​adrianreber](https://togithub.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/123](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/123)
-   ci: add `stylecheck` to golangci-lint by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/128](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/128)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.6.0 to 0.7.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/129](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/129)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.6.1 to 1.7.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/130](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/130)
-   Improve tests, code coverage, and Makefile targets by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/131](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/131)
-   crit: fix proto imports for library by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/109](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/109)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.7.0 to 0.8.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/132](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/132)
-   crit: add features to retrieve memory pages by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/133](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/133)
-   feat(crit): add type to file descriptor by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/134](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/134)
-   rpc: synchronise proto bindings with the latest version of CRIU RPC p… by [@​yevzman-swe](https://togithub.com/yevzman-swe) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/137](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/137)
-   chore(rpc): update Go bindings by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/139](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/139)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.8.0 to 0.9.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/135](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/135)
-   build(deps): bump google.golang.org/protobuf from 1.30.0 to 1.31.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/136](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/136)
-   Add Prajwal S N as a maintainer by [@​rst0git](https://togithub.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/140](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/140)
-   chore(crit): improve Makefile rule by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/141](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/141)
-   crit: add getter for `pagesID` field in `MemoryReader` struct by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/142](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/142)
-   crit: add `FindPs` method on `PsTree` by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/145](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/145)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.9.0 to 0.10.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/143](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/143)
-   feat(crit): add `crit x sk` for sockets by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/138](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/138)
-   crit: add method to retrieve shared memory size of process by [@​behouba](https://togithub.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/146](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/146)
-   build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.10.0 to 0.11.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/147](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/147)
-   release: v7.0.0 by [@​snprajwal](https://togithub.com/snprajwal) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/149](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/149)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​gibmat](https://togithub.com/gibmat) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/104](https://togithub.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/104)
